'''Koth Barak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Midshipman/Legends|midshipman]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] warship ''[[Adamantine]]''. He was the first victim of the [[Death Seed]] plague in [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] though no one knew it at the time. He was found dead by [[Gunnery Sergeant]] [[Gallie Wover]], another member of the ship's crew who would also die of the illness.
